title: Concrete Paired Apparatus Relay Objective Selection Or No-Go Decision
objective: Select a concrete paired apparatus/relay objective set for a later explicit simultaneous-worker pilot, or close with a truthful no-go/defer verdict if no honest pair should open now.
decision_summary: Packet 088 selects Branch N. The simultaneous-worker lane remains authorable in planning terms, but no honest concrete paired apparatus/relay objective set is selected in this tranche. A read-only scan of the published apparatus and relay ownership surfaces found existing implemented clear/search/reset behavior and no current TODO, FIXME, BUG, HACK, XXX, broken, or failing marker that would justify paired mutation. Opening simultaneous workers just to exercise the machinery would invent source churn.

read_only_objective_scan.result: No defect marker or failing-work marker was found. Matches described existing apparatus clear behavior and relay search/selection/reset behavior already represented in source and tests.

abort_condition_note: No Packet 082 or Packet 084 abort condition was triggered because no paired objective was selected and no execution opened.
preserved_authorable_state: A later explicit simultaneous-worker execution packet remains conditionally authorable if a separate packet names real paired apparatus and relay objectives.
Any later objectives must preserve Packet 082 ownership exactly.
Any later objectives must preserve Packet 084 abort rules exactly.
Package files and lockfiles remain coordinator-owned and unchanged.
Publication and host reconciliation remain separate coordinator-owned gates after validation and publication/defer decision.
closed_boundaries: simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution in this tranche
next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 089 - Packet 087 And Packet 088 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
sql_permission_note: This decision packet authorizes no database writes and no source/test execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
